title: Tracking my completed work
excerpt:

posts.author: Knobby (John)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am involved in projects across the business so do a lot in my work, I would like to find some sort of tracking solution that I can look back and see what tasks that were assigned to me were marked done.

These come from many boards but are assigned to me, I want to be able to track and report on my work in all boards but in one place?

Maybe something that copies tasks that are assigned to me and moves the copy to a central board?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

I feel like a Dashboard would be really great for this! You could link all of the boards that you have access to to the Dashboard, and then apply a filter to only show items assigned to you. Then you could add another filter to show what is marked as done.

I’d suggest using the Table Widget for setting this up in the Dashboard. Let us know what you think!
